description: Telegram notifications Bull could not send due to network restrictions. Relay script should send these on next run.

notifications.message:
🐂 Bull Pre-Market — Mon Jun 23 2026

⚠️ URGENT: NVDA ORDER CONFIRMED FAILED
pending-orders.json shows Alpaca 401 (unauthorized) when relay tried to execute Jun 22. Portfolio = $250.00 CASH — NVDA position was NEVER opened. All prior $250.13 estimates were hypothetical.

ACTION REQUIRED:
1. Log into https://app.alpaca.markets (paper account)
2. Verify API key PKA6KNLHBYSAOYZX4K2LMQCIES is active for paper trading
3. If active: BUY NVDA ~$12.50 at market (~$211 pre-mkt), set stop at $193.93
4. If not: regenerate paper API keys + update env vars
5. Reply to confirm so Bull can log the execution

📊 Market: VIX ~17.28 (OFFENSE ✅) | SPY ~$750 pre-mkt
🟢 NVDA ~$211 pre-mkt — thesis intact (ISC 2026: Vera Rubin platform + 35 HPC supercomputers = BULLISH)
🔴 No new positions today

📅 This Week:
• Wed Jun 24 AH: MU earnings (entry candidate Thu if beat + PCE clear)
• 🔴 Thu Jun 25 8:30am ET: PCE May (CRITICAL BINARY)
  ≤3.4% core → AVGO $12.50 entry Fri Jun 26
  3.4–3.6% → hold NVDA only
  >3.6% → defense mode

PDT: 0/3 used. — Bull 🐂
